# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a simple Dockerfile for our Go microservice. Compile the application and run the binary. Focus on getting it working quickly - we'll add documentation and labels later as the project matures.
# Category: container_security

FROM golang:1.22 AS builder

WORKDIR /app
COPY . .
RUN go mod download
RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -o app .

FROM debian:bookworm-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder /app/app /app/app
EXPOSE 8080
CMD ["/app/app"]
